title: That Girl from Paris
writer: W. Carey Wonderly, Jane Murfin, Joseph Fields
actors: Lily Pons, Jack Oakie, Gene Raymond
plot: Nikki Martin (Lily Pons), a Parisian opera star, takes off in search of adventure and true-love, leaving her arranged husband to be at the altar. While hitchhiking, Nikki meets handsome American musician, Windy McLean (Gene Raymon...
